ArraySize

hybrid_array0.4.13

ArraySize

Sections

  • Safety

Required Associated Types

  • ArrayType

Dyn Compatibility

Implementors

In crate hybrid_array

hybrid_array

Trait ArraySize 

Source 
pub unsafe trait ArraySize: Unsigned + Debug {
    type ArrayType<T>: AssocArraySize<Size = Self> + AsRef<[T]> + AsMut<[T]> + Borrow<[T]> + BorrowMut<[T]> + From<Array<T, Self>> + Index<usize> + Index<Range<usize>> + IndexMut<usize> + IndexMut<Range<usize>> + Into<Array<T, Self>> + IntoIterator<Item = T>;
}
Expand description

Trait which associates a usize size and ArrayType with a typenum-provided Unsigned integer.

§Safety

ArrayType MUST be an array with a number of elements exactly equal to Unsigned::USIZE. Breaking this requirement will cause undefined behavior.

NOTE: This trait is effectively sealed and can not be implemented by third-party crates. It is implemented only for a number of types defined in typenum::consts.

Required Associated Types§

Source

type ArrayType<T>: AssocArraySize<Size = Self> + AsRef<[T]> + AsMut<[T]> + Borrow<[T]> + BorrowMut<[T]> + From<Array<T, Self>> + Index<usize> + Index<Range<usize>> + IndexMut<usize> + IndexMut<Range<usize>> + Into<Array<T, Self>> + IntoIterator<Item = T>

Array type which corresponds to this size.

This is always defined to be [T; N] where N is the same as ArraySize::USIZE.

Dyn Compatibility§

This trait is not dyn compatible.

In older versions of Rust, dyn compatibility was called "object safety", so this trait is not object safe.
